criteria.label: Integration Capability
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with existing cloud infrastructure (Azure/AWS) and internal workflows like Jira.

criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Complexity of deployment, including onboarding support and time-to-value.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Comprehensive cost including licensing, egress fees, support, and professional services.

criteria.label: Payment Terms
criteria.description: Alignment of payment terms (e.g., 60 days net) with startup cash flow requirements.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Strict adherence to GDPR requirements and availability of Data Processing Agreements.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Guarantee that data is stored and processed within the EU.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and long-term viability of the vendor to ensure service continuity.

criteria.label: Sustainability Credentials
criteria.description: Alignment with renewable energy sector values, including carbon footprint and ESG transparency.
